summary: The diff implements core frontend infrastructure including routing, authentication, dashboard components, and basic user profile backend functionality. However, it only covers approximately 20-30% of the specified requirements. Most gamification features, learning systems, mini-games, accessibility features, and safety measures are not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create animated welcome screen with exact text and smooth transitions
missing_requirements.reason: WelcomeScreen component exists in routing but implementation file is not included in diff

missing_requirements.requirement: Complete onboarding flow with grade, educational system, and stream selection
missing_requirements.reason: OnboardingFlow component referenced but implementation not shown; backend supports profile creation but frontend form implementation missing

missing_requirements.requirement: Energy Meter system with +5 per correct answer, +20 per quiz, +10 per 15-min study, daily streaks, consistency rewards
missing_requirements.reason: Only basic energy state management exists; no quiz completion tracking, study timer, or reward logic implemented

missing_requirements.requirement: Combo bonus system for consecutive correct answers
missing_requirements.reason: No combo tracking logic or state management found in diff

missing_requirements.requirement: Energy spending system for unlocking mini-games, avatars, themes, tournaments, mastery levels
missing_requirements.reason: Basic spendEnergy function exists but no shop items, unlock logic, or purchase implementation shown

missing_requirements.requirement: Daily quests, weekly missions, Energy Boost Hours, seasonal events, limited-time challenges
missing_requirements.reason: QuestsPanel shows hardcoded daily quests UI only; no reset logic, weekly missions, boost hours, seasonal events, or challenge system

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard with AI-powered weak topic suggestions in Continue Learning button
missing_requirements.reason: ContinueLearningButton shows hardcoded text; no AI logic or weak topic detection algorithm implemented

missing_requirements.requirement: Learning system with 6 question types, timed quizzes, adaptive difficulty, instant explanations
missing_requirements.reason: QuizView component referenced but implementation not included; no question type logic or adaptive difficulty system shown

missing_requirements.requirement: Positive feedback system with specific messages for correct/incorrect answers
missing_requirements.reason: No feedback component or logic found in diff

missing_requirements.requirement: Mastery tracking with concept strength meters, revision reminders, spaced repetition, Practice Again button
missing_requirements.reason: SubjectCard shows random progress percentage; no actual mastery tracking, strength meters, spaced repetition, or targeted practice logic

missing_requirements.requirement: Study resources: interactive notes, summary cards, flashcards with flip animations, video placeholders
missing_requirements.reason: ResourcesHub component referenced but implementation not included

missing_requirements.requirement: Internet Identity with parental control portal, screen-time limits, break reminders, progress reports
missing_requirements.reason: Internet Identity authentication implemented but parental controls, screen-time limits, break reminders, and progress reports missing

missing_requirements.requirement: Safety measures: no ads, no unsafe links, educational-only content, privacy protection, moderation, reporting tools
missing_requirements.reason: No content filtering, link blocking, moderation system, or reporting mechanism implemented

missing_requirements.requirement: Accessibility features: text-to-speech, adjustable fonts, dyslexia-friendly font, offline mode, low-data mode
missing_requirements.reason: Only dark/light mode toggle shown; no text-to-speech, font adjustments, dyslexia font, offline caching, or low-data mode

missing_requirements.requirement: Pop-up notification system for 6 event types with smooth animations
missing_requirements.reason: Sonner toaster imported but no notification triggering logic or pop-up components implemented

missing_requirements.requirement: Supplementary tools: motivational quotes, background music, sound effects, focus mode, exam countdown, timetable, homework reminders, goal-setting
missing_requirements.reason: MotivationalQuote component shows random quote but music toggle, sound effects, focus mode, exam tracker, timetable, homework reminders, and goal-setting missing

missing_requirements.requirement: Weekly performance analytics with accuracy, time tracking, improvement graphs, weak-topic detection, AI suggestions
missing_requirements.reason: AnalyticsDashboard component referenced but implementation not included

missing_requirements.requirement: Achievement badge system with unlock conditions and progress tracking
missing_requirements.reason: AchievementShelf displays hardcoded badges; no unlock logic, condition checking, or progress tracking implemented

missing_requirements.requirement: Grade-appropriate questions with calibrated difficulty
missing_requirements.reason: No question generation, storage, or difficulty calibration system found

missing_requirements.requirement: Olympiad preparation option with information section and 5-question diagnostic quiz
missing_requirements.reason: OlympiadBanner shows promotional card but OlympiadHub implementation not included; no diagnostic quiz or assessment logic

missing_requirements.requirement: Five unlockable mini-games: Word Rush, Math Blaster, Science Snap, Memory Grid, Quiz Battle Mode
missing_requirements.reason: MiniGamesHub component referenced but implementation not included; no game logic or unlock system shown
